entity.summary: Hedera decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol suite providing AMM pool trading, token swaps, and related on-chain liquidity services.
entity.notes: Current first-party HSuite domain remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies HbarSuite as a Hedera AMM DEX and reports substantial current TVL and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: HSuite official platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party HSuite platform domain remains reachable and represents the active Hedera protocol suite.

evidence.title: HbarSuite metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies HbarSuite as a Hedera AMM DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: HbarSuite DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies HbarSuite as a Hedera decentralized exchange and corroborates the first-party protocol identity.
